release_notes: Restore previously open tabs (per-profile checkbox, default ON; chrome --restore-last-session + Default/Preferences session.restore_on_startup=1 seed). Right-click context menu (cut/copy/paste/select-all) in launcher inputs — paste from clipboard now works in every text field. Profile editor header gets right padding so the Windows title-bar overlay (— □ ✕) doesn't clip the title or X close button. ProfileSummary right panel gets top padding to clear the overlay and the probe section (Запустить тест / результаты) is hoisted to the top of the panel.
